executives.name: Steven Dean
executives.background: Mr. Dean is a Fellow of the Australasian Institute of Mining and Metallurgy and a Member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants of Australia. He was formerly the Chairman and CEO of Atlantic Gold Corporation and President of Teck Resources Ltd.

executives.name: Gerrie van der Westhuizen
executives.background: Mr. van der Westhuizen is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the VP Finance of Atlantic Gold Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Jeremy Langford
executives.background: Mr. Langford is a mining engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the COO of Endeavour Mining Corporation.

executives.name: Candice Alderson
executives.background: Ms. Alderson is a lawyer with over 20 years of experience. She was previously the Senior Vice President, Infrastructure Strategy at Ledcor Group.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Dean
board_of_directors.background: Chairman and CEO of Artemis Gold Inc. Former Chairman and CEO of Atlantic Gold Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Atkinson
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Atkinson has over 35 years of experience in the investment industry. He was previously the President and CEO of Loewen, Ondaatje, McCutcheon & Co. Ltd.

board_of_directors.name: Ryan Beedie
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Beedie is the President of Beedie, one of Western Canada's largest industrial and residential developers.

board_of_directors.name: Janice Stairs
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Stairs is a lawyer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry. She is currently the Chair of the Board of Trilogy Metals Inc.

board_of_directors.name: William Armstrong
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Armstrong is a mining engineer with over 50 years of experience. He was previously the Director of Mineral Resources and Mine Development at Teck Resources Ltd.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Social Performance Committee

board_of_directors.name: Lisa Wade
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wade is an environmental engineer with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. She was previously the VP, Environmental, Social and Governance at Goldcorp Inc.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Social Performance Committee
